category_sources: Official repository at https://github.com/google/yamlfmt describes yamlfmt as an extensible command-line YAML formatter.
source_facts.description: Extensible command-line tool to format YAML files.
display_name_sources: Official repository uses the lowercase display name yamlfmt.
docs_sources: Official repository README is a primary documentation surface.
Official repository contains docs/config-file.md for configuration documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/google/yamlfmt, so repository lookup was not performed.
tags_sources: Official repository documentation describes command-line formatting and configuration.
source_facts.description identifies yamlfmt as an extensible command-line YAML formatter.
